name: massdns
title: massdns
description:
high-performance DNS stub resolver
This package contains a simple high-performance DNS stub resolver targeting
those who seek to resolve a massive amount of domain names in the order of
millions or even billions. Without special configuration, MassDNS is capable
of resolving over 350,000 names per second using publicly available resolvers.

commands.name: massdns
commands.description: high-performance DNS stub resolver for bulk lookups and reconnaissance

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use massdns because high-performance DNS stub resolver.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use massdns as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `massdns [options] -r resolvers.txt domains.txt` as documented upstream for massdns.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair massdns with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `massdns --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: massdns - high-performance DNS stub resolver for bulk lookups and reconnaissance
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install massdns. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `massdns [options] -r resolvers.txt domains.txt`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: high-performance DNS stub resolver.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: massdns - high-performance DNS stub resolver for bulk lookups and reconnaissance.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install massdns
Install with: sudo apt install massdns
